# Axivora Connect Ltd (AXIC)
AS-SET : **AS-AXIC (ARIN + RADB)**

ASN: **AS204539**

Enterprise Fiber Internet and VPS services and Local Internet Registry services.  

AS204539 forms the backbone of Axivora Connect’s global network presence,  

Focusing on High-Performance and Low-Latency routing.
